meta.title: DemCon 2027 | A Global Left Summit
meta.description: February 02–04, 2027 in Brussels, Belgium • DemCon is a gathering for progressive voices who believe democracy is worth fighting for. Together, we're mapping the future, sharing strategies, and building the alliances needed to shape what comes next.
